title: KreditBee becomes Unicorn with $280 million Series E fundraise; Touchstone, Trilegal, Bharucha advise investors
description: Finnovation Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd., dba KreditBee, has entered the Unicorn club with a $280 million Series E fundraise led by Motilal Oswal Alternates, Hornbill Capital and Dragon Funds, with participation from existing investors.Touchstone Partners advised lead investor Motilal Oswal Alternates and existing investor Premji Invest on this fundraise. The Firm also advised existing shareholders TPG NewQuest and Archerman Capital.The transaction team consisted of Pranay Bagdi (Partner), Kunal Gop
